Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface IAuctionHandler

  • public interface IAuctionHandler
    Handler for the Auction system. Access via API.getAuctions()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      String buyout​(String listingId, IPlayer<?> player)
      Buyout a listing instantly.
      String cancelListing​(String listingId, IPlayer<?> player, boolean isAdmin)
      Cancel a listing (seller only, unless admin).
      IAuctionListing createListing​(IPlayer<?> player, IItemStack item, long startingPrice, long buyoutPrice)
      Create a new listing.
      int getActiveListingCount()
      Get total count of active listings.
      IAuctionListing[] getActiveListings()
      Get all active listings.
      int getAuctionDurationHours()
      Get the auction duration in hours.
      String getCurrencyName()
      Get the currency name used by the auction system.
      IAuctionListing getListing​(String listingId)
      Get a specific listing by ID.
      long getListingFee()
      Get the listing fee amount.
      IAuctionListing[] getListingsByBidder​(String bidderUUID)
      Get all listings where a player is the current high bidder.
      IAuctionListing[] getListingsBySeller​(String sellerUUID)
      Get all active listings by a specific seller.
      double getMinBidIncrementPercent()
      Get the minimum bid increment percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
      long getMinimumListingPrice()
      Get the minimum listing price.
      double getSalesTaxPercent()
      Get the sales tax percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
      int getSnipeProtectionMinutes()
      Get the snipe protection time in minutes.
      boolean isEnabled()
      Check if the auction system is enabled.
      String placeBid​(String listingId, IPlayer<?> player, long amount)
      Place a bid on a listing.
      void save()
      Force save auction data.
      IAuctionListing[] searchListings​(String searchText)
      Search listings by item name or seller name.

    • Method Detail

      • isEnabled

        boolean isEnabled()
        Check if the auction system is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if the auction system is enabled

      • getActiveListings

        IAuctionListing[] getActiveListings()
        Get all active listings.
        Returns:
        array of all currently active auction listings

      • getListing

        IAuctionListing getListing​(String listingId)
        Get a specific listing by ID.
        Parameters:
        listingId - The listing ID
        Returns:
        The listing, or null if not found

      • getListingsBySeller

        IAuctionListing[] getListingsBySeller​(String sellerUUID)
        Get all active listings by a specific seller.
        Parameters:
        sellerUUID - The seller's UUID as a string
        Returns:
        array of listings created by this seller

      • getListingsByBidder

        IAuctionListing[] getListingsByBidder​(String bidderUUID)
        Get all listings where a player is the current high bidder.
        Parameters:
        bidderUUID - The bidder's UUID as a string
        Returns:
        array of listings this player has bid on

      • getActiveListingCount

        int getActiveListingCount()
        Get total count of active listings.
        Returns:
        the number of currently active listings

      • createListing

        IAuctionListing createListing​(IPlayer<?> player,
                              IItemStack item,
                              long startingPrice,
                              long buyoutPrice)
        Create a new listing.
        Parameters:
        player - The seller
        item - The item to sell
        startingPrice - The starting bid price
        buyoutPrice - The buyout price (0 for no buyout)
        Returns:
        The created listing, or null if failed

      • placeBid

        String placeBid​(String listingId,
                IPlayer<?> player,
                long amount)
        Place a bid on a listing.
        Parameters:
        listingId - The listing ID
        player - The bidder
        amount - The bid amount
        Returns:
        null on success, error message on failure

      • buyout

        String buyout​(String listingId,
              IPlayer<?> player)
        Buyout a listing instantly.
        Parameters:
        listingId - The listing ID
        player - The buyer
        Returns:
        null on success, error message on failure

      • cancelListing

        String cancelListing​(String listingId,
                     IPlayer<?> player,
                     boolean isAdmin)
        Cancel a listing (seller only, unless admin).
        Parameters:
        listingId - The listing ID
        player - The player cancelling
        isAdmin - Whether to bypass ownership check
        Returns:
        null on success, error message on failure

      • getListingFee

        long getListingFee()
        Get the listing fee amount.
        Returns:
        the currency fee charged when creating a listing

      • getSalesTaxPercent

        double getSalesTaxPercent()
        Get the sales tax percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
        Returns:
        the sales tax percentage applied to completed sales

      • getMinBidIncrementPercent

        double getMinBidIncrementPercent()
        Get the minimum bid increment percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
        Returns:
        the minimum bid increment as a percentage of current bid

      • getAuctionDurationHours

        int getAuctionDurationHours()
        Get the auction duration in hours.
        Returns:
        the default auction duration in hours

      • getSnipeProtectionMinutes

        int getSnipeProtectionMinutes()
        Get the snipe protection time in minutes.
        Returns:
        the snipe protection window in minutes

      • getCurrencyName

        String getCurrencyName()
        Get the currency name used by the auction system.
        Returns:
        the display name of the auction currency

      • getMinimumListingPrice

        long getMinimumListingPrice()
        Get the minimum listing price.
        Returns:
        the minimum starting price for new listings

      • searchListings

        IAuctionListing[] searchListings​(String searchText)
        Search listings by item name or seller name.
        Parameters:
        searchText - The search text
        Returns:
        Matching active listings

      • save

        void save()
        Force save auction data.
